title: Stormguard EPDM 5 Metres, D Black Draught Excluder Self Adhesive Rubber Door Window Seal Roll
features: Excellent quality long life self-adhesive EPDM rubber (ethylene propylene diene M-class rubber) draught strip
D profile rubber seal for gaps 3 - 6mm. Self adhesive - Easy to fit
description: Product Description 5 METER ROLL The seal in this pack is dual rolled to minimise packaging. Before fitting, separate the double coil along the entire length. EASY APPLICATION Make sure all surfaces are clean, dry and free from dirt, dust, grease and flaking paint. THREE DIFFERENT COLOURS Available in three different colours.
